s-1.ptxt: REMOVE REAR DOOR INSIDE HANDLE BEZEL PLUG

s2.ptxt: Using a screwdriver with the tip wrapped with protective tape, disengage the 3 claws and remove the rear door inside handle bezel plug.
Using a screwdriver with the tip wrapped with protective tape, disengage the 6 claws and remove the door assist grip cover.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE REAR DOOR TRIM BOARD SUB-ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Using a clip remover, disengage the 7 clips.
Raise the rear door trim board to disengage the 4 claws and remove the rear door trim board together with the rear door inner glass weatherstrip.
Disengage the 2 claws and disconnect the rear door inside handle sub-assembly.
Disengage the clip as shown in the illustration and remove the No. 1 door scuff plate clamp from the rear door trim board.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE REAR DOOR INNER GLASS WEATHERSTRIP

s2.ptxt: Disengage the 3 clips as shown in the illustration and remove the rear door inner glass weatherstrip from the rear door trim board.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE REAR DOOR INSIDE HANDLE SUB-ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Disconnect the cables and remove the rear door inside handle sub-assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE REAR DOOR SERVICE HOLE COVER

s2.ptxt: Remove the rear door service hole cover.

atten4.ptxt: Remove the remaining tape on the door side.

s2.ptxt: Using a "torx" socket wrench (T30), remove the 3 screws.
Move the rear door lock assembly downward and pull the release plate out of the rear door outside handle frame.
Remove the door lock wiring harness seal from the rear door lock assembly.
Using a screwdriver, disengage the claw.

atten4.ptxt: Tape the screwdriver tip before use.

s2.ptxt: Remove the rear door inside locking cable assembly.
Using a screwdriver, disengage the 3 claws.

atten4.ptxt: Tape the screwdriver tip before use.

s2.ptxt: Remove the rear door inside locking cable assembly.
